chunks.text: Eric Cheng named partner in Kirkland & Ellis - EECS at Berkeley Alumnus Eric Cheng (EECS B.S. and B.S. Business Administration, Haas, 2007) was promoted to partner in the Palo Alto and San Francisco offices of Kirkland & Ellis LLP . Eric’s practice focuses on intellectual property disputes in federal district courts around the country as well as before the U.S. International Trade Commission, with an emphasis on patent and copyright infringement, and trade secret misappropriation, involving a wide range of technologies. Categories Alumni Honors Industry View Open Faculty Positions
